title: aster thunbergii
intro: Aster thunbergii, also known as Thunberg's aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Aster thunbergii include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and prevent the formation of blood clots. Aster thunbergii is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being dried and used in capsules or tablets for its medicinal benefits.
